About Me

I'm Reanna — a mechanical engineer turned AI automation specialist based in the Philippines. I design and ship n8n and GoHighLevel systems that read messages, qualify leads, scan receipts, and log data automatically. Every build is live or was live in a real business, not a demo made to look busy.

Action — View Builds

Featured builds

Five automations built end-to-end, from trigger to output. Screenshots are pulled straight from the working canvases.

FIG. 01 — PERSONAL FINANCE

AI Budget Tracker & Receipt Scanner

A multi-agent finance system built from scratch. A Telegram photo of a receipt goes in; a validated, categorized transaction comes out the other end — checked against the month's budget automatically.

  • Gemini reads each receipt photo and extracts merchant, total, category, and payment method
  • Flags duplicate or blurry scans before they reach the sheet
  • Conversational agent answers free-text spending questions straight from live Sheets data
n8nGeminiGoogle SheetsTelegram
n8n — full pipeline, 8 linked sections
FIG. 02 — INVENTORY

Receipt & Inventory Scanner

A sister build focused on stock instead of spend. Every receipt photo is broken down line-item by line-item, and each item updates a live inventory sheet — no manual counting.

  • Telegram-triggered AI agent extracts every line item from a receipt photo
  • Loops through items with custom JavaScript to match and update inventory rows
  • Replaces manual stock entry entirely for the business it runs on
n8nGeminiJavaScriptTelegram
n8n — receipt-to-inventory loop
FIG. 03 — LEAD ROUTING

Lead Categorization with Internal Notifications

A Gmail-triggered workflow that reads incoming leads the moment they land, decides what kind of lead they are, and gets a notification to the right person before the inbox even refreshes.

  • Gemini agent with structured output parsing categorizes each incoming email
  • Logs every lead to Google Sheets automatically
  • Rules-based Switch routes real-time alerts to the correct team member
n8nGmailGeminiGoogle Sheets
n8n — Gmail to routed notification
FIG. 04 — CONVERSATIONAL AI

AI-Powered Facebook Messenger Agent

Two systems talking to each other: a GoHighLevel Messenger workflow hands each new message off to an n8n AI agent, which replies with full conversation memory — no one on the team touches it.

  • GoHighLevel captures the Messenger conversation and calls out over webhook
  • n8n AI agent (Gemini + memory) generates a context-aware reply
  • Response is sent straight back into the same Messenger thread
n8nGoHighLevelGeminiWebhook
n8n — webhook in, AI agent, respond
GoHighLevel — Messenger trigger & handoff
FIG. 05 — ENGAGEMENT

Facebook Comment-to-DM Automation

Turns public comments into private conversations. Built and still running for my family's bakeshop, where it now handles the first response to every post comment.

  • Auto-replies to comments on qualifying posts
  • Opens an interactive Messenger conversation to capture and qualify the lead
  • Live in production, driving real engagement for a small business
GoHighLevelFacebookMessenger
GoHighLevel — comment trigger to DM
